summary: FQ-06 visual player skill tree navigator: every perk node in data/progression/perks.json (7 lanes x 3) gains description, cost, grid position, and same-lane prerequisites (validator-enforced). Perk economy: one point per player level above 1; purchased_perks is world-owned progression state with unknown-id dropping. Miner lane live: stone_recovery multiplies effective_mine_speed by 1.15 through the combined-effect recompute, and the attunement_bonus path makes the FQ-05 perk join point live code (data-only from here). New K-key skill tree panel (preloaded script, no class_name): scrollable node canvas from data positions, locked/available/purchased states, inspector, learn button backed by real level-derived points, Esc-chain integration. Verification loop caught two real defects pre-review (class_name editor-cache gotcha detected via the stale-results freshness check; an attunement-clamp load-ordering regression caught by the FQ-05 surplus check at 168/169) — both fixed. Review: no must-fix; 2 should-fix + 2 nits applied. Smoke 163 -> 169.
scope: FQ-06 only, per docs/FABLE_TASK_QUEUE.md. Implementation commit ff3a0ea plus this evidence-only packet commit; pushed to origin/main.
next_action: FQ-07: visual asset pipeline with color fallback.
